title: VETERAN RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: VETERANS RESOURCE CENTER VETERAN RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides hygiene items, a temproary mailing address, telephone and computer use, housing assistance, case management services, and information and referral to other community partners. 601 N Grape Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Veterans and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 779-8564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-8564 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off W Jackson and N Grape Streets Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Telephone Facilities * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - GPD CASE MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
